title: Crompton Greaves is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Crompton Greaves is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Crompton Greaves are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Srinagar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Crompton Greaves:
Crompton Greaves is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Crompton Greaves!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
